resumeData.summary: Sr. Director-level Product leader with 15+ years of 0-to-1 product development, platform strategy, and team leadership across AI, adtech, and enterprise SaaS. Currently leading agentic AI platform at JPMorgan Chase from inception to 7,000+ active users, delivering LLM-powered search with 99% top-5 accuracy and automated workflows eliminating 90%+ manual work. Previously owned $500M+ annual revenue at Yahoo across targeting and monetization infrastructure, managing PM teams and driving cross-functional execution at 20B+ daily scale. Proven ability to build, scale, and lead product organizations in fast-moving, high-stakes environments.
